name: Opple Lighting Co.,LTD.
summary: Opple Lighting Co.,LTD. researches, develops, manufactures, and sells lighting products primarily in China. The company's products include LED and traditional light products, lamps, ceiling fixtures, and electrical appliances. It offers LED bulbs, candles, spots, filaments, battens, soft strips, tubes, and modules; LED Home Luminaires, such as ceiling, decorative, table, mirror, and other products; and LED Professional Luminaires, including downlights, spotlights, panels, linear indoor products, industrial lighting, and outdoor light products. The company was founded in 1996 and is headquartered in Shanghai, China.
